title: travis: bump go to 1.9.x and 1.10.x
body:
Update the used go versions from 1.8.x to 1.9.x and 1.9.x to 1.10.x.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

comments.body: Go 1.11 is around the corner, so I think it's a good time to bump the vector.

:pushpin: Commit 2affe11 has been approved by `rhatdan`
